center.name: Imre Frivaldszky
center.summary: Imre Frivaldszky是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括灰斑鸠，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Eurasian collared dove (Streptopelia decaocto), often simply just collared dove, is a dove species native to Europe, Asia, and northern Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Eurasian collared dove (Streptopelia decaocto), often simply just collared dove, is a dove species native to Europe, Asia, and northern Africa
